  • Overview
  • Tree

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    CommandResult<T>
    Represents the result of a robot command execution.
    DiscoveredRobot
    Represents a robot discovered on the network.
    JsonCodec
    An interface for encoding commands into JSON and decoding JSON responses.
    JsonResponse
    Represents a standardized JSON response received from the robot.
    JsonResponse.Payload
    Represents the payload section of a JSON response.
    MazeRobot
    A specific implementation of a robot controller that navigates a maze, identifies objects, and performs actions based on the object's color.
    MBot2
    Represents an MBot2 robot and provides an interface for controlling it.
    MBot2JsonCodec
    An implementation of JsonCodec specifically for the MBot2 robot's JSON protocol.
    RobotCommandException
    An exception thrown when an error occurs during the execution of a robot command.
    RobotController
    An abstract controller for a robot, providing core functionalities for discovery, connection, and teardown.
    RobotDiscovery
    An interface for discovering robots on the network.
    RobotService
    An interface defining the contract for communicating with a robot.
    RobotServiceException
    An exception thrown when an error occurs within the robot service layer.
    SensorCache
    A thread-safe cache for storing and providing access to the robot's sensor data.
    SensorCache.BallData
    A simple, immutable container for data about a detected ball.
    SensorSnapshot
     
    ServiceLocator
    A simple service locator pattern implementation for registering and retrieving services.
    TcpRobotService
    An implementation of RobotService that uses TCP/IP for communication with a discovered robot.
    TelemetryListener
    A listener that runs in a separate thread to receive telemetry data from the robot over UDP.
    UdpDiscoveryService
    An implementation of the RobotDiscovery interface that uses UDP broadcast to discover robots on the local network.
